labels.notes: Julie Ann Cooper's single visit was over-split. User reports 3 separate sessions were created. The split between this and 2bac28e5 was driven by STT hallucinations at the transcript boundary (multilingual garbage — Chinese, Polish, Dutch, Portuguese fragments — likely pure noise mis-detected as speech). Merge-check LLM correctly declined to merge because the 'next' excerpt looked chaotic, but the underlying issue is the STT hallucinations that produced that excerpt.
